data.title: NANO Nuclear (NNE) Expands in Africa With Togo Deal: What's Going On?
data.description: Nano Nuclear Energy shares are trading lower by 2% during Thursday's session. The company earlier announced it signed a MOU with the Togolese Republic.

data.title: Korn Ferry Sees Revenue Dip Despite Beating Estimates, Guidance Underwhelms
data.description: Korn Ferry (NYSE: KFY) reports lower Q2 FY25 results with revenue down 4.3% Y/Y, but adjusted EBITDA and EPS increase. Company also increases dividend and repurchases shares.

data.title: Why Bitcoin Cash Is Seeing Blue Skies
data.description: As Bitcoin soars past $100,000 for the first time, its rally is reverberating across the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin Cash (CRYPTO: BCH) emerging as a noteworthy beneficiary.
